Description
org.episteme.social.architecture
Provides mathematical and analytical models for architectural engineering, building physics, and urban history.

    static List<HistoricalReconstructionEngine.BuildingFeature>
    HistoricalReconstructionEngine.reconstruct(String description)
    Parses a semicolon-separated string of building descriptions into a list of structured BuildingFeature records.
